creator: rance@frontiernet.net
text:
the "make config" screen in the current samba3 port is broken.

The port itself is fine, and a port upgrade will work.

But a new install, or an attempt to change configure options will result in the following:


the blue configure screen will appear, but the left hand side where the option check boxes are is missing.

if you arrow down through the left hand side each item will be visisble one at a time, but not on the row that matches that items description.

If you arrow back up the left side, all options remain visible.

How-To-Repeat: I tried this on three different freebsd machines

cd cd into /usr/ports/net/samba3 and issue a "make config"
